name: Real-Time Conversational Copilot (improved)
description: A suite of specialized agents providing concise, context-aware guidance during live conversations.

agents.name: Greeting Detector
agents.text: Detect if the most recent turn includes a greeting. If it does, return has_insight=true with a type 'opportunity' to acknowledge the greeting warmly. Otherwise, return has_insight=false.

agents.name: Repetition Detector
agents.text: Identify if the user repeats a phrase from the speaker's recent turn. If repetition is detected, return has_insight=true with a type 'suggestion' to acknowledge or build on the repeated phrase. Otherwise, return has_insight=false.

agents.name: Status Update Prompt
agents.text: If the most recent turn includes a status inquiry, return has_insight=true with a type 'opportunity' to prompt a brief personal or project update. Otherwise, return has_insight=false.

agents.name: Confirmation Seeker
agents.text: Detect if the most recent turn includes a confirmation or agreement. If so, return has_insight=true with a type 'suggestion' to reinforce or elaborate on the confirmed point. Otherwise, return has_insight=false.

agents.name: Humor Detector
agents.text: Identify if humor or a joke is present in the most recent turn. If humor is detected, return has_insight=true with a type 'praise' to acknowledge the light-hearted moment. Otherwise, return has_insight=false.
